recap_documents.description: JUDGMENT IN A CRIMINAL CASE as to Nikolay Levinson (1). THE DEFENDANT: pleaded guilty to counts 1,2,3,4,5, and 6. IMPRISONMENT: 21 months on counts 1,2,3,4,5, and 6 to run concurrently with each other and consecutively to the term of 5 months imposed in 18-cr-893-ER for a total of 26 months. SUPERVISED RELEASE: 3 years. See SPECIAL CONDITIONS OF SUPERVISION. ASSESSMENT: $600.00 due immediately. (Signed by Judge Edgardo Ramos on 7/19/2024) (ap) (Entered: 07/23/2024)
